title: Workflows in Monday - I've seen instructions for them, when are they rolled out?
excerpt: Has anyone else seen the Workflow feature? I’ve seen posts about it, but I don’t see it being rolled out… Anyone have anymore information on this?

posts.author: sjhoffman (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone else seen the Workflow feature? I’ve seen posts about it, but I don’t see it being rolled out… Anyone have anymore information on this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sam,

Great point.

At this time, the workflow builder is being gradually released to users, which is why you are yet to see it in your account. Whilst we can’t commit to an ETA of full release, do keep an eye out in your account. Thanks for your understanding!

posts.author: Patrmg (Patrmg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Is there a way to have the beta version of Workflow builder?
We have found documentation, but impossible to have the feature in ouf account…
Thank you

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Patrmg,

I have reached out to the product team in charge and will update you as soon as I hear back. Thanks for your patience

posts.author: sjhoffman (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love if we could get in on the Beta as well!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I have heard back from our product team who confirmed that at this time, they’re no longer taking on new customers for the beta testing. They’re currently working on making the necessary improvements based off of the feedback provided by the testing group. I am awaiting more information on a full release and will update you accordingly. Thanks for your continued understanding!

posts.author: ryanabundant (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Respectfully, this is ridiculous! We pay for the same tier that other customers do, yet we can’t take advantage of the same efficiencies gained by new features that are rolled out - despite the fact that we’ve opted in for beta features. I can respect R&D’s decision to roll things out in a Beta testing fashion to gather feedback and perfect features, but to say that this is inequitable would be an understatement. Get yourselves together, Monday!!

posts.author: sjhoffman (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any updates on a potential release date for workflows?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone! Whilst this may be subject to change, the team are aiming to have the workflow builder (beta version) released, by the end of the year. I appreciate the demand for this release, and am working with our product team to communicate the information I can. Please rest assured that when release details are confirmed, the community will be the first to know

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, I’d like to point out the Workflow builder is already advertised as available to Standard plan subscribers, despite not actually being available. My clients have been quite confused over the instruction in this article not matching what they actually see. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/11065311570066-Get-started-monday-workflows

posts.author: Patrmg (Patrmg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca,
Do you have news about the workflow builder?
When can we test it (beta version)?
Thank you for your help.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for flagging this Dylan and please extend our apologies to your clients! We have raised this with our team and requested the article be updated as the feature is not in-fact available to all accounts yet, it is still in testing phase at this stage. An ETA of full release will be shared when confirmed however the feature still requires fine-tuning and improvements before we can roll the feature out to all

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Patrmg,

I am afraid we have closed the testing group at this stage, however we do aim to have the beta version released by the end of the year - as mentioned in my reply to Dylan, as soon as I have more information about the release, I will let you all know!

posts.author: vjabbinante13 (Vito Abbinante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Any update here? Will this be released soon?

Thank you

posts.author: ArianeLW (Ariane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am also super keen to get this rolled out on our account as soon as possible. Given we are now in 2024 (where is 2023 gone?!) - do we have any ETA on when it will be released to all accounts?

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ariane and @vjabbinante13,

Apologies for my delayed reply, I’ve been OOO

I’ve just requested an update ETA and will let you all know ASAP!

posts.author: ArianeLW (Ariane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hope you had a wonderful time off - and thanks for chasing this up for us!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Ariane and to you too!

Our team aims to continue the release of the beta version of this feature by the end of January - if there are any changes I will circle back here!

posts.author: Domandu (Dominick Coppinger)
posts.cookedHtml: Following up on this, is there any news as to the release? We’re also very keen to get access to the feature but it still doesn’t seem to be available yet.

posts.author: ArianeLW (Ariane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any updates on this Bianca, as we are now in Feb (how time flies!!)?

Thanks a lot!

posts.author: bmck097 (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Any updates?

posts.author: sjhoffman (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca - I know we were looking at the end of January for a release. Are there any updates on an updated release date/timeline?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone - my sincerest apologies for missing your replies!

Thank you all for checking in on this

We were recently informed that the gradual release will continue through to the end of Q1 - I apologise for the delay here. Our team were able to identify areas that require further refining before we can confidently release the feature, with no compromise on quality. I appreciate how patient you’ve all been, so please rest assured I will be keeping an eye on this feature and monitor any future changes!

Thanks again for always bearing with us!

posts.author: ArianeLW (Ariane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Does that mean we should be good to go in April?

Thanks!

Ariane

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ariana,

That is the plan at this stage! I’ve checked in with the team incase anything has changed and I will let you know

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sjhoffman

Welcome to the monday.com community! monday.com workflow builder is an easy-to-use tool for centralizing all the elements of your business together. This tool enables you to create and publish internal productivity workflows or portals without writing a single line of code. From timesheet management to expense approval, you can build and launch workflows in minutes. With automated workflows, you can improve your business efficiency while freeing up valuable IT resources.

If you’re looking to build workflows from scratch, collaborate with monday.com consultants from an experienced services provider. These consultants can construct personalized workflows using robust templates.

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: But it is not yet released?

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Workflows in Monday - I've seen instructions for them, when are they rolled out? Platform discussions
Hey everyone - my sincerest apologies for missing your replies! Thank you all for checking in on this We were recently informed that the gradual release will continue through to the end of Q1 - I apologise for the delay here. Our team were able to identify areas that require further refining before we can confidently release the feature, with no compromise on quality. I appreciate how patient you’ve all been, so please rest assured I will be keeping an eye on this feature and monitor an…

Jasper, refer to this post. End of Q1 is in April.

posts.author: bmck097 (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Is the end of Q1 date applicable worldwide, or will this only be available to US/EU users like some other new features? Specifically asking for Australia.

posts.author: sjhoffman (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates now that we’re in Q2?

posts.author: ArianeLW (Ariane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Any updates on this one?! I was so excited on Tuesday to see if we had workflows yet… And unfortunately still no

Thanks!

Ariane

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: https://monday.slack.com/archives/C050HR7DV46/p1710404115299259?thread_ts=1704964258.453249&cid=C050HR7DV46

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: It was a reply to @DamcoSolutions. A lot of talking about it, while not released yet.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Thank you for being patient with me while I’ve been in communication with our product team.

I’ve had confirmation that the feature has been released to 75% of our Pro accounts, with 100% Pro accounts to have the feature granted throughout April.

We also plan to have the feature rolled out to Enterprise accounts by the end of Q2. If you’re on an Enterprise plan and would like to access the feature early, please DM me your email address (ensuring you’re an admin on the account)

posts.author: Mdenciger (miriam@projectextreme.org)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good afternoon,

I don’t seem to have the option to create a workflow, and I’m wondering when I will be able to see the feature. We do have a Pro account.

Thank you so much!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for flagging Miriam! I will check on this with the team.

posts.author: Po77sy (Peter Potts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca
Is there an update on the realise of the new workflow beta ?
Question i have a board with over 70 automations will this new feature map my existing automations ? @BiancaT
Thanks P

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Julietteb, any news on the release of the workflow builder for all accounts, as well as a roadmap for its development?
Thanks!

posts.author: rikazkhan (rikaz)
posts.cookedHtml: To get the most accurate and up-to-date information regarding the rollout of workflows in Monday.com, I recommend checking the official Monday.com website, blog, or contacting their support team directly.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are there any plans to allow support for file columns and dropdown columns in the workflow Builder?

I really thought it would be more powerful than classic automations, but at the moment it seems a lot more limited.

posts.author: leonidas (Leonidas)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here. Pro user and still no Workflow option appearing when I click the plus button to create things in the left hand side panel. Is this supposed to have been released in April for all users or still being rolled out. It’s very unclear online including the Monday’s new releases updates. Please let us know what is the status so that we know when to check and whether to report issues like not being able to see it despite being Pro users.

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml:
To get the most accurate and up-to-date information regarding the rollout of workflows in Monday.com, I recommend checking the official Monday.com website, blog, or contacting their support team directly.

With respect, this isn’t helpful at all. I’ve just spent 15 minutes on the Monday blog trying to find any updates about Workflow feature and could not find anything relevant. Since DECEMBER 2023 The Workflow feature has been publicly advertised here as being available to all Standard+ plans, and yet many of us (including my clients) still cannot access it. Considering the timeline and having the feature already advertised, Monday should have public statement on when this will actually be available, not something you have to ask through a support ticket.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Everyone! Sorry about the delay here. I checked with the team and confirmed that workflows is now available for pro accounts and enterprise accounts request early access to monday workflows if you do not see it in your account yet.

Here are some great resources to learn about monday workflows

  • Watch out recent session recording Discover the power of monday workflows (recording)
  • Check out the workflows lesson in the monday academy.
  • Read this article from our extensive knowledge base.

@Maor

posts.author: davidmiller (David Millar)
posts.cookedHtml: The Workflow feature is being gradually rolled out, so not all users have access to it yet. You can check the updates page or contact their support for more information on its availability. Keep an eye on your account as it might be enabled soon.

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julietteb it seems the workflow feature is now exclusive to Enterprise accounts.
One of the reasons my company is migrating from Asana to Monday was, aside from Monday’s flexibility, the comprehensiveness of the workflow feature. Now it seems to be lacking and the Enterprise tier cost doesn’t make sense to us.
Do you have any plans to make the feature available back to Pro users in the near future?

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml:
So after being publicly advertised as available to all Standard+ plans for months, it’s now officially “Available on Enterprise plans only” according to this.

This is false advertising, plain and simple.

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is spot on. And not only for this feature.

Also the connected Boards limit would be raised with the new Database for Pro Plan, NOT the case.

One Master Board as a template so you can adjust only the template for multiple boards, ONLY Enterprise…

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
I bet hundreds of clients were left in the dark with the removal of this feature from the Pro plan and are unwilling to upgrade to Enterprise. The price point is prohibitive, at least for us in Brazil.

Considering moving off to other platform entirely. I really wouldn’t like to go back to excel/google sheets for workflows.

Do you have any news on this?
@CXS @CSG @Julietteb @BiancaT @Maor

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any news? @CXS @CSG @BiancaT
I feel that only the enterprise tier is having acess to all new features in the Work Management product - really anticipated features such as cross-project dependencies, workflows, portfolios.
The thing is the pricing difference from the Pro tier to Enterprise seems a bit unfair.
It’s not that we need all the Enterprise features, only the basic ones needed for proper project management.

I really hope this can be steered to another direction soon. Or the Enterprise account can be made more affordable.
Thanks!
